creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #4)

As I stated, the failing environment is/was the poudriere jail. I checked the host - as you commented prior the library in question was on the host - but it was missing in the jail's binary path! I did quite a lot updates within the past two days and after you hinted me towards the lib, I did an update of the jails again with r309194.

This time, the libraries
libBlocksRuntime[_p].[so|a]

where all present.

A rebuild of the port via an updated poudriere jail ran cleanly through!

So, I guess I can close this issue and thank you very much as well as Guido Falsi for the patience and time spent on this problem.

Kind regards,

Oliver
